hero.title: Calm support for your child — and for you
hero.lead: My name is Olena Stakhova. For nearly 10 years I've been helping children and teenagers understand their emotions — and helping parents regain calm and confidence.
hero.card: years of experience with children and families
help.label: How I help
help.title: Situations worth talking about
help.sub: If anything on this list sounds familiar — you don't have to handle it alone.
help.1p: Fear of school, separation, the dark. We find the source and rebuild a sense of safety.
help.2p: Anger, outbursts, withdrawal. I teach children to understand and express emotions safely.
help.3p: New country, new school, two languages. I support families through gentle transitions.
help.4p: Early identification and developmental support for young children — assessment, therapy, family work.
help.5p: Online safety, prevention and support after difficult experiences on the internet.
help.6p: When it's hard to connect. Together we rebuild trust, bonding and everyday communication.
offer.label: Services
offer.title: How we can work together
offer.1p: We always start together: discussing the situation, your child's needs and a support plan.
offer.2p: Regular age-appropriate work — conversation, play, art therapy and behavioural therapy elements.
offer.3p: Group sessions: communication, cooperation, understanding emotions and peer relationships.
offer.4p: For schools, preschools and parents: cyberbullying prevention, integration, emotions and child safety.
about.label: About me
about.title: Let's get acquainted
about.p1: I am a child and adolescent psychologist. I began my career as a teacher — which is why I see the whole child: not just the difficulty, but the context of family, school and environment.
about.p2: I have worked at the SOS Specialist Centre and the Internationaler Bund Polska foundation, and I run workshops for the Empowering Children Foundation (Dajemy Dzieciom Siłę) and the Institute of Mother and Child. As a TeamUp trainer I support families affected by war, and I teach psychology in postgraduate studies at WSKZ in cooperation with the Jagiellonian University.
about.quote: “A child is not a problem to be fixed. A child is a person who needs understanding — and parents deserve calm and support.”
exp.label: Experience
exp.title: Professional journey
exp.t1: Started working as a child psychologist — primary school and preschool
exp.t2: Private psychology practice; work with children with disabilities
exp.t3: Kraków — psychologist at Słoneczna Przestrzeń Wsparcia
exp.t4: SOS Specialist Centre and English-speaking preschool “First Step”
exp.t5: TeamUp trainer — SOS Children's Villages camps for families from Ukraine; TUS groups
exp.t6: Workshops for the Empowering Children Foundation and the Institute of Mother & Child; Via Viator helpline
exp.t7: Psychology lecturer — WSKZ postgraduate studies in cooperation with the Jagiellonian University
exp.orgs: Organisations and projects I work with:
steps.label: How it works
steps.title: Four simple steps
steps.1p: Briefly describe your situation. I reply within 24–48 hours.
steps.2p: We meet with parents — I learn about the situation and your child's needs.
steps.3p: Together we agree on goals, format and frequency of sessions.
steps.4p: I work with your child — and you always know where we are.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.1a: Polish, Ukrainian, English or Russian — whichever is most comfortable for you and your child.
faq.2q: Do I bring my child to the first visit?
faq.2a: No. The first meeting is for parents only — we calmly discuss the situation and decide on next steps together.
faq.3q: How long is a session and how often do we meet?
faq.3a: A session lasts 50 minutes. We usually meet once a week — frequency is always adjusted to the child's needs.
faq.4a: Yes — I work both at my Kraków office and online. Parent consultations work very well remotely.
faq.5a: Yes. I am bound by professional confidentiality. Everything concerning your child is discussed with parents only.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Book your first consultation
contact.lead: Write a few words about your situation — I'll reply within 24–48 hours and we'll find a convenient time together.
contact.langsp: polski · українська · English · русский — choose the language that feels easiest for you and your child.
form.name: Name
form.msgph: A few words about your situation…
form.ok: Thank you! Your message has been sent (demo).
form.privacy: Your data is used only to contact you about a consultation.
